documents.title: Documents
documents.subtitle: Manage CRA compliance documentation for this product.

declaration_of_conformity.title: Declaration of Conformity
declaration_of_conformity.description: EU Declaration of Conformity per CRA Annex V. Required for placing your product on the EU market.

vulnerability_disclosure_policy.title: Vulnerability Disclosure Policy
vulnerability_disclosure_policy.description: Coordinated vulnerability disclosure process. Required under CRA Article 11.

incident_report.title: Incident Report Template
incident_report.description: Security incident notification template per CRA Article 14. For reporting to ENISA.

risk_assessment.title: Risk Assessment Matrix
risk_assessment.description: Cybersecurity risk assessment. Identifies threats, vulnerabilities, and mitigation measures.

technical_documentation.title: Technical Documentation
technical_documentation.description: Technical documentation outline per CRA Annex VII. Covers design, development, and testing.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
errors.noContent: Please save the document before generating a PDF.
errors.uploadFailed: Failed to upload PDF. Please try again.
errors.noPdf: No PDF available. Generate one first.
errors.planRequired: PDF export requires a Professional plan or higher.

fields.productIdentificationPlaceholder: Model number, serial number, or unique identifier…
fields.conformityStatementPlaceholder: The above product is in conformity with the requirements set out in the Cyber Resilience Act…
fields.standardsAppliedHint: Comma-separated list of harmonised standards or specifications.
fields.signatoryNamePlaceholder: Full name of the authorized person
fields.policyScopePlaceholder: Describe what systems and products this policy covers…
fields.responseTimelinePlaceholder: e.g. Initial acknowledgment within 24 hours, triage within 72 hours…
fields.disclosureTimelinePlaceholder: e.g. Coordinated public disclosure after 90 days…
fields.safeHarborStatementPlaceholder: Assurance that good-faith reporters will not face legal action…
fields.mitigationActionsPlaceholder: Actions taken to contain and remediate…
fields.threatDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the threat landscape and threat actors…
fields.mitigationPlanPlaceholder: Actions planned to reduce identified risks…
fields.techDocScopePlaceholder: Products and systems covered by this documentation…
fields.developmentProcessPlaceholder: Development methodology, tools, and secure coding practices…
fields.testingResultsPlaceholder: Test plans, results, and verification activities…
fields.updateMechanismPlaceholder: How security updates are delivered to users…
fields.supportPeriodPlaceholder: e.g. 5 years from date of sale
